title: Herogo Stainless Steel Colander, 24 cm Square Metal Kitchen Colanders with Handle, Micro-Perforated Strainer for Draining Food Pasta Fruit Vegetable, Smooth Edge and Elevated Feet, Dishwasher Safe
features: Herogo Stainless Steel CStainless Steel Colander - Herogo kitchen colander made of food grade stainless steel, durability and rustproof, safe and healthy for daily draining, Premium metal colanders won’t bend or break under heavy loads, Sturdy for long time use

Comfortable to Hold & Easy to Store - Two handles are firmly connected to the colander and provide a comfortable grip to hold when rinsing vegetables, Also convenient to hang on kitchen hold rack which can save space and keep kitchen neat

Micro-Perforated & Drain Quickly - 3mm small and closely spaced holes covered all around of colanders and smooth surface without any rough spots , Enable to drain or rinse water quickly, Great to clean vegetable, fruit, pasta, noodles

Stable Bottle Base - 4 elevated feet on the base can keep stability and don’t worry about colanders tough the bottom of the sink, As a good helper for your daily cooking at home and restaurants, easy to clean and dishwasher safe

Multi-Purpose - 24 x 8.5 cm (Total size with handle is 31cm), Large colander Ideal for draining, straining and cleaning kitchen foods, One size can meet your various needs in the kitchen, Also can be used for food container
description: Product Description Herogo Stainless Steel Colander Meet Your Kitchen Needs Versatile and Metal Colander Square Shape & Perfect Size Material: Premium quality stainless steel, durability and rustproof, great for daily kitchen use. Shape: Square Multi-Purpose: Draining/washing/rinsing vegetable fruit pasta spaghetti noddle Package Included: 1 stainless steel colander Sturdy kitchen colander is easy to clean or just put in the dishwasher safe to save your time. As a versatile kitchen tool, this colander suitable for kitchen counter, countertop or various kitchen prep. Premium Quality Construction Elevate Your Kitchen Experience Clean Tips & Maintenance 1. Please wash the colander carefully before first use. 2. Please use soft dishcloth to clean the colander and DON’T rub with sharp metal after used. 3. Please use towel dry immediately after cleaning and store in a dry place for better maintenance. 4. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
